title: A Comparative Study of Autogenous Modernity in Donghak and Daesoon Thought
subtitle: - Centered on Views of Heaven, Earth, and Humanity -
author: Choi Won-hyeok
university: Daejin University Graduate School, Department of Daesoon Studies
